description_long: This is a large, square wooden storage box constructed from weathered wooden planks, reinforced with thick wooden beams along the edges and corners. The sides feature diagonal and vertical support beams, giving it a classic crate appearance often seen in industrial or urban environments. The wood is aged, with visible grain and subtle discoloration, suggesting outdoor or heavy-duty use. The top is flat and bordered by a raised wooden frame, indicating it could be stacked or used as a surface. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the box appears solid and robust. Its utilitarian design makes it suitable for storing or transporting goods in garages, warehouses, or on city streets.
description: A large, weathered wooden storage box with reinforced edges and a flat, stackable top, featuring diagonal and vertical support beams for added strength.
description_view_0: Front view shows a wooden crate with a diagonal support beam running from the bottom left to the upper right, framed by thick wooden borders.
description_view_1: This side view mirrors the front, with a diagonal support beam running from the bottom right to the upper left, and similar wooden framing.
description_view_2: The back view displays two vertical support beams without any diagonal bracing, giving it a simpler, more symmetrical appearance.
description_view_3: This side view is identical to view 1, with a diagonal support beam from bottom right to upper left and reinforced wooden edges.
